creator: amdmi3@amdmi3.ru
text:
> Synopsis: [NEW-PORT] deskutils/q4wine
> 
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=131416

FYI, I've improved the port a bit, see attached shar; note a bit
cleaner English in pkg-descr (though not perfect yet). Currently
I'm investigating the possibility of making it NOT use /dev/kmem,
as this is obviously wrong and dangerous thing for a desktop
application to do.

Maintainer and q4wine author are CC'd, feel free to mail me privately
(Russian is OK).

--
